    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J K L M N P R S T U V W X Y Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    R

    R_TURN - Static variable in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    RecordSave - Class in model
    RecordSave is basically the record that is saved by the Leaderboard, it contains the ID (which is the nickname of the current Profile, only the first 5 characters in caps) and the points accumulated through a match in Play.
    RecordSave(String, int) - Constructor for class model.RecordSave
    RecordSave constructor setting the id and points
    reduceRobotSleep(int) - Method in class model.level.Room
    Reduces the time for the robot sleep timer
    RenderPlay - Class in view.util.play
    Class used to render sprites of the Play
    RenderPlay() - Constructor for class view.util.play.RenderPlay
     
    reset() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Lift
    Put the lift in the original state
    reset() - Method in class model.entity.enemy.entities.Ball
    Put the ball in the original state
    reset() - Method in class model.entity.enemy.entities.Robot
    Put the robot in the original state
    reset() - Method in class model.entity.EntityManager
    Resets all presented managers
    reset() - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Put the player in the original state
    reset() - Method in class model.Leaderboard
    Reset the leaderboard list
    reset() - Method in class model.level.Level
    Resetting the level basically resets all the entities inside
    reset() - Method in class model.Profile
    Resets the current profile to the default one
    reset() - Method in class view.panel.ResultPanel
    Resets all the text and disable the optional ones (victory/loser and highscore text)
    resetAllEnemies() - Method in class model.entity.enemy.EnemyManager
    Reset all the enemies in their original state and position
    resetAllLifts() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Reset all lifts in their original position
    resetLeaderboard() - Method in class model.Game
    Resets the current leaderboard
    resetLifts() - Method in class model.level.Room
    Terminal RESET LIFT
    resetLifts() - Method in class model.Play
    Terminal RESET LIFTS
    resetProfile() - Method in class model.Game
    Resets the stats of the current profile
    resetSounds() - Static method in class view.util.play.AudioPlay
    Resets all the sounds, disabling the landing state to put back in the initial state
    restart(Play) - Method in class model.Game
    Restart the game, stopping the previous one if was in progress and starting a new one
    RESULT - Enum constant in enum class view.Navigator.ScreenStates
     
    ResultPanel - Class in view.panel
    Panel used to show the result of the Play match
    ResultPanel(Navigator) - Constructor for class view.panel.ResultPanel
    ResultPanel constructor that initialize and add the components
    ROAM - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.enemy.entities.Robot.RobotAction
     
    Robot - Class in model.entity.enemy.entities
    Robot is an Enemy that represents a simple grounded robot that can have different behavior upon the creation (depending also if it has the range attack).
    Robot(float, float) - Constructor for class model.entity.enemy.entities.Robot
    Robot constructor that sets it's hitbox and atkbox
    ROBOT - Enum constant in enum class model.util.EntityFactory.EntityTypes
     
    ROBOT - Static variable in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    Robot.RobotAction - Enum Class in model.entity.enemy.entities
     
    Room - Class in model.level
    Level that contains the passes to win the game and enemies to avoid.
    Room(String) - Constructor for class model.level.Room
    Room constructor initializing all the datas from the file given
    run() - Method in class controller.Controller
    Runs the game loop and depending the UPS it updates and render the Play
    RUN - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.Player.PlayerActions
